name: Bloodthirst
description: When an enemy you can see within 30 feet of you takes damage and becomes bloodied (but is not killed outright), you can use your reaction to teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within 5 feet of that enemy, then make one melee attack. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

mechanics.trigger: enemy within 30 ft takes damage and becomes bloodied
mechanics.effect: teleport to an unoccupied space within 5 ft of the enemy, then make one melee attack
